purpose: AXIOM Terminal operator command registry. This registry classifies terminal commands by risk, category, mutability, and runtime boundary.

commands.name: axiom
commands.description: Enter C:\axiom and activate the AXIOM virtual environment.

commands.name: axiom-help
commands.description: Display the compact AXIOM Terminal command surface.

commands.name: axiom-help-all
commands.description: Display the full AXIOM Terminal command catalog.

commands.name: axiom-doctor
commands.description: Consolidated AXIOM Terminal diagnostics for profile loader, modules, visual config, registry, editor, tools, and safety boundaries.

commands.name: axiom-guard
commands.description: Display terminal safety boundaries.

commands.name: axiom-now
commands.description: Compact read-only operator-critical status panel.

commands.name: axiom-edit
commands.description: Open a file in the terminal editor. File editing can change source files, but does not directly mutate AXIOM runtime state.

commands.name: ae
commands.description: Short alias for axiom-edit.

commands.name: axiom-find
commands.description: Search project text.

commands.name: axiom-preflight
commands.description: Run the standard safe verification chain.

commands.name: axiom-status
commands.description: Run foundation verification.

commands.name: axiom-audit
commands.description: Run lifecycle and execution audits.

commands.name: axiom-agent-audit
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 5 agent boundary audit.

commands.name: axiom-policy-audit
commands.description: Run the read-only policy/security audit.

commands.name: axiom-operator-command-audit
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 6 operator command ledger audit.

commands.name: axiom-telegram-gateway-audit
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 6G Telegram gateway configuration and storage audit.

commands.name: axiom-phase6-audit
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 6I closeout and hardening audit.

commands.name: axiom-phase7-inventory
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 7A v1.13 acceptance inventory audit.

commands.name: axiom-phase7-acceptance
commands.description: Run the Phase 7B acceptance runner and prerequisite gate in read-only report mode.

commands.name: axiom-phase7-e2e-gate
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 7C full-goal E2E gate audit.

commands.name: axiom-phase7-closeout
commands.description: Run the read-only Phase 7E closeout and hardening audit.

commands.name: axiom-health
commands.description: Run supervisor health for latest session.

commands.name: axiom-regression
commands.description: Run full pytest regression.

commands.name: axiom-test
commands.description: Run targeted pytest command.

commands.name: axiom-dashboard
commands.description: Read-only AXIOM status panel backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-readiness
commands.description: Read-only execution readiness report backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries and local file checks.

commands.name: axiom-queue
commands.description: Read-only task queue panel backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-model
commands.description: Read-only model profile and trust-boundary panel backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-manifests
commands.description: Read-only manifest and tool-capability integrity panel backed by SQLite mode=ro queries and local SHA256 checks.

commands.name: axiom-budget
commands.description: Read-only provider and resource usage panel backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-events
commands.description: Read-only recent session/security event panel backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-operator-commands
commands.description: Read-only Phase 6 operator command intent ledger panel backed by local SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-telegram-gateway
commands.description: Read-only Phase 6H Telegram gateway boundary panel backed by local config and SQLite mode=ro queries.

commands.name: axiom-phase7
commands.description: Read-only Phase 7 acceptance and full-goal E2E gate visibility panel.

commands.name: axiom-handoff
commands.description: Generate snapshot, handoff, and bundle.

commands.name: axiom-logs
commands.description: Show recent AXIOM log files.

commands.name: axiom-visual
commands.description: Reprint startup visual panel.

commands.name: axiom-theme
commands.description: Show terminal theme resources and prompt-mode guidance.

commands.name: axiom-posh-on
commands.description: Enable Oh My Posh dashboard prompt.

commands.name: axiom-posh-off
commands.description: Disable Oh My Posh dashboard prompt for session.

commands.name: axiom-posh-test
commands.description: Diagnose Oh My Posh loading.

commands.name: axiom-registry
commands.description: Audit AXIOM Terminal command registry coherence against loaded shell commands.

commands.name: axiom-registry-check
commands.description: Compatibility alias for axiom-registry.

commands.name: axiom-visual-mode
commands.description: Show AXIOM Terminal visual configuration.

commands.name: axiom-visual-native
commands.description: Switch AXIOM Terminal to compact native prompt mode.

commands.name: axiom-visual-dashboard
commands.description: Switch AXIOM Terminal to Oh My Posh dashboard prompt mode.

commands.name: axiom-banner-on
commands.description: Enable AXIOM Terminal startup status panel.

commands.name: axiom-banner-off
commands.description: Disable AXIOM Terminal startup status panel.

commands.name: axiom-visual-reset
commands.description: Reset AXIOM Terminal visual configuration to defaults.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-report
commands.description: Read-only AXIOM Terminal suite report with optional file output.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-changelog
commands.description: Read AXIOM Terminal changelog.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-note
commands.description: Append timestamped note to AXIOM Terminal changelog only.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-changelog-path
commands.description: Print AXIOM Terminal changelog path.

commands.name: axiom-docs
commands.description: Show indexed AXIOM documentation and key project files.

commands.name: axiom-doc
commands.description: Open indexed AXIOM documentation or key project file in terminal editor.

commands.name: axiom-doc-path
commands.description: Print indexed AXIOM documentation or key file path.

commands.name: axiom-docs-terminal
commands.description: Show terminal documentation entries only.

commands.name: axiom-docs-runtime
commands.description: Show runtime file entries only.

commands.name: axiom-docs-policy
commands.description: Show policy file entries only.

commands.name: axiom-docs-tools
commands.description: Show tool file entries only.

commands.name: axiom-docs-agent
commands.description: Show Phase 5 agent documentation and files only.

commands.name: axiom-system-map
commands.description: Show static AXIOM runtime/tool/UI boundary map.

commands.name: axiom-boundaries
commands.description: Show terminal/runtime safety boundaries.

commands.name: axiom-runtime-map
commands.description: Show AXIOM runtime component map.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-map
commands.description: Show AXIOM Terminal component map.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-test
commands.description: Run AXIOM Terminal suite regression check without touching AXIOM runtime state.

commands.name: axiom-terminal-snapshot
commands.description: Generate saved AXIOM Terminal suite state snapshot artifacts.

commands.name: axiom-watch
commands.description: Foreground read-only refresh panel for AXIOM Terminal.

commands.name: axiom-watch-once
commands.description: Run one refresh of an AXIOM Terminal read-only watch panel.

commands.name: axiom-watch-help
commands.description: Show AXIOM watch usage and modes.

commands.name: axiom-task
commands.description: Read-only task detail viewer by task_id.

commands.name: axiom-task-latest
commands.description: Read-only latest task detail viewer.

commands.name: axiom-archive-logs
commands.description: Archive older AXIOM log files into logs/archive using the approved archive_logs.py tool.

commands.name: axiom-archive-logs-path
commands.description: Print the archive_logs.py tool path.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: autonomous_operation
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: AXIOM is intentionally fail-closed and non-autonomous.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: safe_pass_enablement
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Safe-pass readiness may be present for bounded Phase 7 E2E readiness only; no direct terminal enablement shortcut is allowed.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: model_profile_promotion
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Current trusted model profile cannot be manually promoted.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: real_model_or_cloud_calls
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Gateway expansion is not current phase.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: sandbox_process_execution
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: SandboxGateway is not enabled for real process execution.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: telegram_operator_control_plane
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Telegram polling is explicit/manual only; direct terminal ingestion, confirmation, and default live bot runtime remain blocked.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: agent_layer
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Manual/test-only Phase 5 agent foundation exists, but automatic agent control is blocked.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: automatic_scheduler_executor_integration
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Manual no-op cycle exists but must not be automatically connected yet.

blocked_direct_shortcuts.name: automatic_scheduler_agent_integration
blocked_direct_shortcuts.reason: Phase 5 agents must not be connected to scheduler automation yet.

manual_test_tools.name: tools/run_manual_agent_foundation_smoke.py
manual_test_tools.boundary: Phase 5 manual/test-only smoke; no direct terminal shortcut.

manual_test_tools.name: tools/audit_agent_boundary.py
manual_test_tools.boundary: Phase 5 read-only audit; exposed through axiom-agent-audit and axiom-preflight.

manual_test_tools.name: tools/execute_goal_planning_task.py
manual_test_tools.boundary: Phase 5 manual/test-only wrapper; no direct terminal shortcut.

manual_test_tools.name: tools/execute_task_planning_task.py
manual_test_tools.boundary: Phase 5 manual/test-only wrapper; no direct terminal shortcut.

manual_test_tools.name: tools/execute_tool_execution_task.py
manual_test_tools.boundary: Phase 5 manual/test-only wrapper; no direct terminal shortcut.

manual_test_tools.name: tools/execute_result_verification_task.py
manual_test_tools.boundary: Phase 5 manual/test-only wrapper; no direct terminal shortcut.
